ai_summary: Infobeans Technologies Limited reported robust consolidated revenue growth of 36.6% year-over-year for Q1 FY27, receiving a clean limited review report from its auditors. However, this strong top-line performance was significantly offset by a material 7.3% decline in consolidated Profit After Tax year-over-year, largely due to a substantial increase in employee benefit expenses and reduced other income. This divergence between strong revenue growth and contracting profitability warrants further investigation into cost management and margin sustainability.
